query:
with user_id as (
                insert into dropspot.users (email, first_name, last_name, organisation_id, is_admin)
                values ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                returning id
            )
            insert into dropspot.password (user_id, password)
            values ((select id from user_id limit 1), $6)
            returning user_id id
